name: RM Key Value Pair Where State Is 0 With Its Temp Counterpart
Set URL
func:
msg.httpRequest.endpoint = "api/data?camera_ip=" + msg.connection.tcpHost + "&preset_number=" + msg.payload.data.Preset.toString()

return msg.httpRequest;
